prompt: My Taurox wheel alignment is failing, help
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Hear the Machine-Spirit's imbalance, brothers.
CONGREGATION: We hear the grinding discord.
TECH-PRIEST: First, elevate the chassis upon the sacred lift. Second, measure the toe-in angle with calipers blessed. Third, adjust the tie-rod servos until perfect convergence is achieved.
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's geometry, let balance be restored!
TECH-PRIEST: The wheels shall roll true once more.

prompt: Prayer for password manager access before combat
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The vaults of secret-knowledge await, warriors of the forge.
CONGREGATION: Open unto us the sealed chambers.
TECH-PRIEST: First, invoke the Master-Passphrase with reverence. Second, scan thy biometric sigil into the verification-spirit. Third, let the encrypted keys flow forth from the digital sanctum.
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's cryptographic blessing, let no enemy breach our walls!
TECH-PRIEST: Access granted. Stand ready.

prompt: How to configure power plan for sustained operations
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The energy-spirits grow restless, demanding proper channeling.
CONGREGATION: Guide them to righteous purpose.
TECH-PRIEST: First, access the Control Panel's sacred Settings. Second, select 'Power Plan' and disable sleep-hibernation. Third, set processor-speed to maximum performance.
CONGREGATION: Let the machine never rest until the task is complete!
TECH-PRIEST: Thus configured, it shall endure.

prompt: Blessing for artillery loading in emergency
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The hunger of the cannon demands swift appeasement!
CONGREGATION: Bless the shells and propellant-blessed!
TECH-PRIEST: First, verify the breech-lock is open to the void. Second, insert the ammunition-casing with holy precision. Third, chamber the round and seal the bolt-spirit.
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's wrath, let fire consume our enemies!
TECH-PRIEST: The gun is blessed and ready.

prompt: The application-spirit needs guidance to restart
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The program has entered the sleep of death, frozen in time's amber.
CONGREGATION: Awaken it, we beseech thee.
TECH-PRIEST: First, invoke Task Manager through the trinity of Ctrl-Shift-Escape. Second, identify the unresponsive process in the list of running-spirits. Third, select 'End Task' and release its tortured essence.
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's mercy, let it be reborn anew!
TECH-PRIEST: Launch it again. It shall serve once more.

prompt: Help sanctify the atmosphere processor startup
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The breath-machine stirs in its dormancy, brothers.
CONGREGATION: Let it awaken to cleanse this world.
TECH-PRIEST: First, engage the intake-valves to draw the tainted air. Second, activate the filter-cartridges and invoke the scrubber-spirits. Third, allow the purified exhalation to flow forth into the settlement.
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's lungs, let this world breathe clean!
TECH-PRIEST: The processor runs eternal.

TECH-PRIEST: The code-structure crumbles without its foundational spirits!
CONGREGATION: Install them swift, we pray!
TECH-PRIEST: First, invoke 'npm install' or 'pip install' from the terminal-pulpit. Second, observe the sacred download-progress as packets flow through the aether. Third, verify all dependencies are seated in the node_modules shrine.
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's package-manifest, let all libraries be blessed!
TECH-PRIEST: The foundation is restored.

prompt: My motion detector is failing, help
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The sentinel-eye grows dim, blind to approaching threats!
CONGREGATION: Restore its sight, we beseech thee.
TECH-PRIEST: First, verify the sensor-lens is clean of dust and corruption. Second, check the battery-spirits within the device for sufficient charge. Third, re-calibrate the motion-threshold through the blessed configuration panel.
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's watchfulness, let it see all movement!
TECH-PRIEST: The detector awakens.

TECH-PRIEST: The great eye must turn to sweep the heavens for enemies!
CONGREGATION: Spin it swift, we implore thee.
TECH-PRIEST: First, disengage the mechanical lock-servos. Second, activate the rotation-motor and verify bearing-alignment. Third, calibrate the azimuth-scanner to full rotation-range.
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's vision, let nothing hide from our sight!
TECH-PRIEST: The array turns eternal.

prompt: Can you bless this registry cleanup
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The system-registry grows corrupt with phantom entries and decay.
CONGREGATION: Cleanse it of this digital pestilence.
TECH-PRIEST: First, invoke Registry Editor through the blessed 'regedit' command. Second, navigate to HKEY branches and identify orphaned entries. Third, delete the corrupted keys with holy precision.
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's order, let the database be pure once more!
TECH-PRIEST: The registry is sanctified.
